implementation_summary: config.py: Removed SUPPORTED_DISTROS import, _validate_distro() function, vm_distro dataclass field, vm_distro=answers.get('distro') from from_wizard(), vm_distro=vm_distro from cls() in load(), and 'distro': self.vm_distro from save(). Replaced _validate_distro call in load() with inline alpine rejection + ubuntu INFO log.

provisioner.py: Removed vm_distro playbook variable. Removed opencode-alpine guard (dead code). Fixed _apply_distro_suffix to use hardcoded 'ubuntu' suffix. Fixed error message that referenced vm_distro.
cli.py: Replaced linux-arm64-musl branch with unconditional linux-arm64 (type error fix, Story 05 behavior).
lima.py: Replaced get_distro_provider(config.vm_distro) with get_cloud_image('ubuntu') (type error fix, Story 05 behavior).
tests: Removed all vm_distro= kwargs from Config constructors across 5 test files. Deleted test_config_distro.py (Story 03 skips honored). Added Story 04 skip to test_opencode_alpine_raises.

test_counts.skipped_note: 1x Story 05 (test_lima.py), 4x Story 04 (test_provisioner.py — includes test_opencode_alpine_raises newly added)
